title: haplopappus setulosus
intro: Haplopappus setulosus, also known as the woolly rabbitbrush, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Haplopappus setulosus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
